name: @ptdl/plugin-subtable-pro
description: Enhanced sub-table field widget for hasMany/m2m associations: subclasses the native SubTableFieldModel so submit stays 100% native, adds a configurable totals row (sum weight/volume/amount), and (later) card/list views + a client-side bridge so clicking rows in another Table block adds/increments rows here (POS, cargo-loading, quick quotes). Standalone drop-in for the native sub-table. Full Vietnamese UI.
